steps.title: Infer the needed action
steps.content: The situation is undesirable: Black residents of Norfolk had few formal banking options. Booker then chartered a bank that provided home loans and savings opportunities, so the blank must mean to correct the situation.

steps.title: Test the verbs in context
steps.content: A would mean lengthen the problem, C would mean keep it, and D would mean merely call attention to it. Booker instead took action to remedy the lack of services. The answer is B.
